examples: The main compositions of supercritical CO2 fluid extraction product of Foeniculum vulgare Mill. seeds are anethole and fatty acids.
The major compound is Trans-Anethole(93.5%). Andcis-Anethole is 0.13%.
CONCLUSION: The main compositions of supercritical CO2 fluid extraction product of Foeniculum vulgare Mill. seeds are anethole and fatty acids.
At issue is whether absinthe needs to contain minimum levels of two substances - anethole and the chemical thujone, a toxin extracted from wormwood, which reputedly has mind-altering effects.
